title: sphalmanthus oculatus
intro: Sphalmanthus oculatus, also known as the yellow-flowered Sphalmanthus, is a succulent plant species belonging to the family Aizoaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Sphalmanthus oculatus is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
